case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SUE KONG et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, SUE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2012
